videos.headline: Coy Eakin gives Texas Tech its first touchdown
videos.description: Will Hammond finds Coy Eakin in the end zone for a 30-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Coy Eakin gives Texas Tech its first touchdown) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordyn Tyson gives Arizona State a two-score lead
videos.description: Arizona State goes up 16-7 on Jordyn Tyson's short-touchdown reception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordyn Tyson gives Arizona State a two-score lead) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arizona State upsets Texas Tech on a late TD
videos.description: Raleek Brown runs in a one-yard touchdown in the final minute and Arizona State upsets Texas Tech 26-22.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arizona State upsets Texas Tech on a late TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Will Hammond pushes into the end zone for Texas Tech
videos.description: Will Hammond fights his way into the end zone to make it a one score game for Texas Tech vs. Arizona State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Will Hammond pushes into the end zone for Texas Tech) 2025/10/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas Tech goes ahead on Reggie Virgil's TD
videos.description: Will Hammond finds Reggie Virgil for a 12-yard touchdown and Texas Tech goes up 22-19 after the two point conversion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas Tech goes ahead on Reggie Virgil's TD) 2025/10/18 ESHEET
